entries.evidence_summary: The ad-hoc runner now requires a prior compliance-map.json, validates implementer evidence artifacts, and includes referenced evidence files in the boxed source bundle before review begins.
Audit helpers and both uniqueStrings behaviors are now shared through audit-utils.ts instead of living as divergent local copies.
The shared reviewer parser now validates verdict tokens strictly against the governed contract vocabulary and no longer aliases off-contract approve to approved.
Run-level audit envelopes now emit a non-null review_mode sentinel of none when no review round exists, preserving the required audit field on pre-round and cycle artifacts.
Shared governed utility logic now comes from audit-utils.ts for audit envelopes and string-dedup helpers instead of duplicated private implementations.
Review bundles now include every file referenced by prior compliance, fix, and diff evidence, and the shared component-repair engine fails closed if any requested authority file cannot be boxed.
Blocked startup exits now write run-postmortem.json, and result evidence counts are derived from separate validation and self-check issue arrays instead of ad hoc code filters.
